name: Before the Throne
text:
Cannot be a stronghold province.
Interrupt: When this province is broken – take 2 honor from your opponent.

name: Guardians of the Seikitsu
text:
Earth role only.
Reaction: After this province is revealed – bow each character with printed cost 2 or lower.

name: Kaiu Inventor
text: Action: Choose a holding you control – you may trigger each of that holding's triggered abilities an additional time this round (or specified period).

name: Doji Shizue
text: During the fate phase, if you have the Imperial Favor, this character cannot lose fate or be discarded.

name: Agasha Sumiko
text: While you have the Imperial Favor, this character does not bow as a result of conflict resolution while attacking.

name: Mountaintop Statuary
text:
Reaction: After this holding is turned faceup – move it onto your stronghold province.
Action: During a conflict at this province, sacrifice this holding. Choose an attacking character with printed cost 2 or lower – move that character home.

name: Akodo Toshiro
text: Action: While this character is attacking – it gets +5[mil] until the end of the conflict. Provinces cannot be broken during this conflict. At the end of the conflict, if you do not control a Commander character, discard this character.

name: Implacable Magistrate
text: While this character is attacking, only this character and honored characters count their skill toward the resolution of this conflict.

name: Haughty Magistrate
text: While this character is attacking, characters with lower glory than this character do not count their skill toward the resolution of this conflict.

name: Fawning Diplomat
text: Interrupt: When this character leaves play – claim the Imperial Favor.

name: Utaku Mediator
text: This character gets +1[mil] and +1[pol] while you do not have the Imperial Favor.

name: The Imperial Palace
text:
Limit 1 per deck.
This holding adds +3 to your side during each glory count.

name: Pit Trap
text:
Attach to a character.
Play only on an attacking character.
Attached character does not ready during the regroup phase.

name: Curry Favor
text: Reaction: After a character you control bows as a result of conflict resolution from a second conflict you declared this round – ready that character.

name: Centipede Tattoo
text:
Monk character only. Attached character gains the Tattooed trait.
Attached character does not bow as a result of conflict resolution in conflicts which it lost.

name: Guard Duty
text:
Keeper role only.
Action: If attached character is defending – honor it.

name: Seal of the Phoenix
text: Attached character gains the  clan symbol and the Scholar trait.

name: Backhanded Compliment
text:
Keeper role only.
Action: Choose a player – that player draws 1 card and loses 1 honor.

name: Gaijin Customs
text: Action: If you control a  card, choose a non- character – ready the chosen character.

name: Way of the Chrysanthemum
text: Reaction: After 1 or more honor is given to you from an honor bid – gain that much honor. (Max 1 per round.)
